title: Marana Mass Lyrics From Petta
stanzas:
Paakathaana pora
Indha kaliyoda aattatha

Thatlaattam thaanga
Tharlaanga songa
Ullara vanthaakka
Naan pollaatha vaenga.

Thimiraama vaanga
Bulpaaidum veenga
Morappoda nippaanaa
Muttaama ponga.

Geththa nadathu varraan
Gate-ai ellaam
kadanthu varraan
Tha vediya onnu
Podu dhillaala..

Sleeva surutti varraan
Collara than peratti varraan
Mudiyala siluppi vittaa
Yerum ullaara ..

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Adhukku avanthaan
Porandhu varanum

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Stepu muraiyaa vizhanum.

Thatlaattam thaanga
Tharlaanga songa
Ullara vanthaakka
Naan pollaatha vaenga.

Thimiraama vaanga
Bulpaaidum veenga
Morappoda nippaanaa
Muttaama ponga.

Evanda Mela
Evanda keezha
Ella uyiraiyum
Onnaave paaru

Mudinja varaikum
Anba seru
Thalaiyil yethivachi
Kondaadum ooru..

Nyayam irundhu
Edhirthu variyaa
Unna madhippen
Adhu en pazhakkam

Kaala izhuthu
Uyara nenachaa
Ketta paya sir
Idiyaa idikkum

Geththa nadathu varraan
Gate-ai ellaam
kadanthu varraan
Tha vediya onnu
Podu dhillaala..

Sleeva surutti varraan
Collara than peratti varraan
Mudiyala siluppi vittaa
Yerum ullaara ..

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Adhukku avanthaan
Porandhu varanum

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Stepu muraiyaa vizhanum.

Thatlaattam thaanga
Tharlaanga songa
Ullara vanthaakka
Naan pollaatha vaenga.

Thimiraama vaanga
Bulpaaidum veenga
Morappoda nippaanaa
Muttaama ponga.

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Adhukku avanthaan
Porandhu varanum

Maranam Massu maranam
Toughu tharanum
Stepu muraiyaa vizhanum.
tamilStanzas:
தட்டலாட்டம் தாங்க
தரலாங்க சாங்க
உள்ளார வந்தாக்க
நான் பொல்லாத வேங்க

திமிராம வாங்க
பல்பாயிடும் வீங்க
மொறப்போட நிப்பானா
முட்டாம போங்க.

கெத்தா நடத்து வர்றான்
கேட்-ஐ எல்லாம்
கடந்து வர்றான்
த்தா வெடிய  ஒன்னு
போடு தில்லால

ஸ்லீவ சுருட்டி வர்றான்
காலரதான்  பெரட்டி வர்றான்
முடிய சிலுப்பி விட்டா
ஏறும் உள்ளாரா

மரணம் மாஸு  மரணம்
toughu தரனும்
அதுக்கு அவன்தான்
பொறந்து வரணும்

மரணம் மாஸு  மரணம்
toughu தரனும்
ஸ்டெப்பு முறையா விழணும்

தட்டலாட்டம் தாங்க
தரலாங்க சாங்க
உள்ளார வந்தாக்க
நான் பொல்லாத வேங்க

திமிராம வாங்க
பல்பாயிடும் வீங்க
மொறப்போட நிப்பானா
முட்டாம போங்க.

எவண்டா மேல
எவண்டா கீழ
எல்லா உயிரையும்
ஒன்னாவே பாரு

முடிஞ்ச வரைக்கும்
அன்ப சேறு.
தலையில் ஏத்திவச்சி
கொண்டாடும் ஊரு..

நியாயம் இருந்து
எதிர்த்து வறியா
உன்ன மதிப்பேன்
அது என் பழக்கம்

கால இழுத்து
உயர நெனச்சா
கெட்ட பய சார்
இடியா இடிக்கும்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Marana Mass'?

'Marana Mass' is an energetic celebration of life and joy, showcasing a vibrant atmosphere that encourages listeners to enjoy the moment.

In which movie does 'Marana Mass' feature?

The song is featured in the movie Petta, which is known for its engaging storyline and powerful performances.

Who are the artists behind 'Marana Mass'?

The song is sung by Anirudh and the legendary SPB, with lyrics penned by Vivek and music composed by Anirudh.

When was 'Marana Mass' released?

'Marana Mass' was released on December 3, 2018, and quickly became a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Marana Mass', the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the celebratory moments in the movie Petta. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The collaboration between Anirudh and SPB adds a unique charm, blending modern beats with classic vocals. This song encapsulates the essence of living in the moment and enjoying life to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Marana Mass is a high-energy anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anirudh's electrifying beats and the legendary SPB's powerful vocals, this track is a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood. Experience the magic of Petta through this unforgettable collaboration that promises to get you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Look at this dance of the Kali goddess.
The dance is lively, the songs are here, I won't let anyone down.
Come in darkness, you will be welcomed, don't be afraid, just go ahead.
I will break down the gates, I will remove all obstacles, just put the fire down.
The sleeves will come loose, the collar will come off, if you don't fit in, you will be thrown out.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, for that, it has to come to birth.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, step by step, it will fall down.
The dance is lively, the songs are here, I won't let anyone down.
Come in darkness, you will be welcomed, don't be afraid, just go ahead.
Whoever is above, whoever is below, every soul is looking at you.
Until the end, love will unite, the town will celebrate with joy.
Is there justice in this? Will it come to you? I will respect you, that is my habit.
If time is written, if you think high, the bad will come back to you.
I will break down the gates, I will remove all obstacles, just put the fire down.
The sleeves will come loose, the collar will come off, if you don't fit in, you will be thrown out.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, for that, it has to come to birth.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, step by step, it will fall down.
The dance is lively, the songs are here, I won't let anyone down.
Come in darkness, you will be welcomed, don't be afraid, just go ahead.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, for that, it has to come to birth.
Death is a mass, it must be tough, step by step, it will fall down.
